title: Milk Bread
excerpt: Ingredients 500 ml cake flour 5 g instant yeast (1/2 packet) 5 ml sugar 2,5 ml salt 1 egg 250 ml lukewarm milk Method put the cake flour, yeast, sugar and salt in a mixing bowl and stir through with a fork break the egg into the middle and work it in with …
html:
Ingredients

  • 500 ml cake flour
  • 5 g instant yeast (1/2 packet)
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 2,5 ml salt
  • 1 egg
  • 250 ml lukewarm milk

 

Method

  1. put the cake flour, yeast, sugar and salt in a mixing bowl and stir through with a fork
  2. break the egg into the middle and work it in with your hands
  3. now slowly add the lukewarm milk and start kneading. If it sticks too much to your hands, add more flour
  4. cover it with a tea towel and let it rise until double the original size
  5. spray a bread pan. Knead the dough down and put it in the bread pan. Cover it again and let it rise until it forms a high loaf.
  6. bake for 30 minutes at 180C
